description: Product Description Why should you choose our slippers? Friendly materials Made from good materials to protect your home Lightweight and portable Lightweight and portable, can be taken and used anywhere Save more money Supports cold water for repeated cleaning and saves you money. More places to use Holiday rentals Hotels Family members and guests Flights and travel Ibnb guests Family celebrations Birthday parties Wedding celebrations 1, Home: Comfortable, lightweight and convenient slippers are perfect for friends, guests, relatives, classmates, brothers and guests at home and of course our friendly slippers support repeated washing! 2,SPA: Ladies also wear soft plush disposable slippers to relax your feet in the spa! 3,Hotel: Durable slippers with EVA soles and velvet uppers, better than most hotel slippers! 4,Travel: Lightweight and portable fluffy slippers are perfect for outings WARM TIPS Each new pair of slippers comes in an individually sealed bag. Our spa slippers use ethylene vinyl acetate soles. Due to the long storage in the sealed bag, there is some odour when opened. We therefore recommend opening the package to allow the smell to dissipate once you receive the slippers. Usually, the smell of the soles will dissipate after 12 hours. EASY CARE: Machine wash in cool water, lay flat to dry, keep away from heat sources.
